description.value:
Travel-clauses from winter road-ledgers — Fjordmål merchants once inscribed silence-promises into their load-fasteners to keep cargo from rattling on ice roads; a hunter repurposed the formula for armor buckles.

Effect: You gain an edge on tests made to move quietly in snow, sleet, or heavy rain.

Rules: Edge; Tests.

project.prerequisites: A suit of armor of at least basic quality; a lodestone from a frozen road
